sEn: We introduce a real-time, high-fidelity neural audio codec with a novel loss balancer and lightweight Transformer for further compression.
sZh: 我们提出了一种实时高保真神经音频编解码器，采用新颖的损失平衡器和轻量级Transformer进一步压缩。
absEn: We introduce a state-of-the-art real-time, high-fidelity, audio codec leveraging neural networks. It consists in a streaming encoder-decoder architecture with quantized latent space trained in an end-to-end fashion. We simplify and speed-up the training by using a single multiscale spectrogram adversary that efficiently reduces artifacts and produce high-quality samples. We introduce a novel loss balancer mechanism to stabilize training: the weight of a loss now defines the fraction of the overall gradient it should represent, thus decoupling the choice of this hyper-parameter from the typical scale of the loss. Finally, we study how lightweight Transformer models can be used to further compress the obtained representation by up to 40%, while staying faster than real time. We provide a detailed description of the key design choices of the proposed model including: training objective, architectural changes and a study of various perceptual loss functions. We present an extensive subjective evaluation (MUSHRA tests) together with an ablation study for a range of bandwidths and audio domains, including speech, noisy-reverberant speech, and music. Our approach is superior to the baselines methods across all evaluated settings, considering both 24 kHz monophonic and 48 kHz stereophonic audio. Code and models are available at github.com/facebookresearch/encodec.
absZh: 我们介绍了一种最先进的实时高保真音频编解码器，利用神经网络。它由一个流式编码器-解码器架构和量化潜空间组成，以端到端方式训练。我们通过使用单个多尺度频谱图对抗器来简化和加速训练，该对抗器有效减少伪影并产生高质量样本。我们引入了一种新颖的损失平衡机制来稳定训练：损失的权重现在定义了它应代表的整体梯度的比例，从而将该超参数的选择与损失的典型尺度解耦。最后，我们研究了如何将轻量级Transformer模型用于进一步压缩获得的表示高达40%，同时保持比实时更快。我们详细描述了所提出模型的关键设计选择，包括：训练目标、架构变化以及对各种感知损失函数的研究。我们进行了广泛的主观评估（MUSHRA测试）以及消融研究，涵盖了各种带宽和音频领域，包括语音、嘈杂混响语音和音乐。我们的方法在所有评估设置中均优于基线方法，考虑24 kHz单声道和48 kHz立体声音频。代码和模型可在github.com/facebookresearch/encodec获取。

contrib.en: Introduced a real-time, high-fidelity neural audio codec with streaming encoder-decoder and quantized latent space.
contrib.zh: 提出了一种实时、高保真的神经音频编解码器，采用流式编码器-解码器和量化潜在空间。

contrib.en: Simplified training with a single multiscale spectrogram adversary that reduces artifacts and produces high-quality samples.
contrib.zh: 使用单一多尺度频谱图对抗器简化训练，减少伪影并生成高质量样本。

contrib.en: Proposed a novel loss balancer mechanism that stabilizes training by decoupling loss weights from their typical scale.
contrib.zh: 提出了一种新颖的损失平衡器机制，通过将损失权重与其典型尺度解耦来稳定训练。

contrib.en: Demonstrated lightweight Transformer models can further compress representations by up to 40% while staying faster than real time.
contrib.zh: 展示了轻量级Transformer模型可进一步压缩表示高达40%，同时保持快于实时的速度。

contrib.en: Achieved state-of-the-art subjective and objective results across multiple bandwidths and audio domains, including speech and music.
contrib.zh: 在多个带宽和音频领域（包括语音和音乐）取得了最先进的主观和客观结果。

contrib.en: Provided extensive ablation studies and subjective evaluations (MUSHRA) for various design choices.
contrib.zh: 对各种设计选择提供了广泛的消融研究和主观评估（MUSHRA）。

limits.en: The model's performance may degrade for audio domains not well represented in the training set.
limits.zh: 对于训练集中未充分代表的音频领域，模型性能可能下降。

limits.en: The streaming setup introduces a small degradation in quality compared to the non-streamable version.
limits.zh: 流式设置相比非流式版本会引入轻微的质量下降。

limits.en: The entropy coding increases initial latency, which may not be suitable for low-latency applications.
limits.zh: 熵编码增加了初始延迟，可能不适合低延迟应用。

limits.en: The 48 kHz model is slower than real time on a single CPU core, limiting its use for real-time streaming.
limits.zh: 48 kHz模型在单CPU核心上慢于实时，限制了其实时流式应用。

limits.en: The Transformer language model's compression gain varies with bandwidth, being less effective at higher bitrates.
limits.zh: Transformer语言模型的压缩增益随带宽变化，在较高比特率下效果较差。

items.en: We introduce a state-of-the-art real-time, high-fidelity, audio codec leveraging neural networks. It consists in a streaming encoder-decoder architecture with quantized latent space trained in an end-to-end fashion. We simplify and speed-up the training by using a single multiscale spectrogram adversary that efficiently reduces artifacts and produce high-quality samples. We introduce a novel loss balancer mechanism to stabilize training: the weight of a loss now defines the fraction of the overall gradient it should represent, thus decoupling the choice of this hyper-parameter from the typical scale of the loss. Finally, we study how lightweight Transformer models can be used to further compress the obtained representation by up to 40%, while staying faster than real time. We provide a detailed description of the key design choices of the proposed model including: training objective, architectural changes and a study of various perceptual loss functions. We present an extensive subjective evaluation (MUSHRA tests) together with an ablation study for a range of bandwidths and audio domains, including speech, noisy-reverberant speech, and music. Our approach is superior to the baselines methods across all evaluated settings, considering both 24 kHz monophonic and 48 kHz stereophonic audio. Code and models are available at github.com/facebookresearch/encodec.
items.zh: 我们介绍了一种最先进的实时高保真神经音频编解码器。它采用流式编码器-解码器架构，具有量化潜空间，并以端到端方式训练。我们通过使用单一多尺度频谱图对抗器来简化和加速训练，该对抗器能有效减少伪影并生成高质量样本。我们引入了一种新颖的损失平衡机制来稳定训练：损失权重现在定义了其在整体梯度中应占的比例，从而将该超参数的选择与损失的典型尺度解耦。最后，我们研究了如何利用轻量级Transformer模型将获得的表示进一步压缩高达40%，同时保持快于实时的速度。我们详细描述了所提出模型的关键设计选择，包括：训练目标、架构变化以及对各种感知损失函数的研究。我们进行了广泛的主观评估（MUSHRA测试）以及消融研究，涵盖了多种带宽和音频领域，包括语音、带噪混响语音和音乐。在24 kHz单声道和48 kHz立体声音频的所有评估设置中，我们的方法均优于基线方法。代码和模型可在github.com/facebookresearch/encodec获取。

items.en: Recent studies suggest that streaming audio and video have accounted for the majority of the internet traffic in 2021 (82% according to (Cisco, 2021)). With the internet traffic expected to grow, audio compression is an increasingly important problem. In lossy signal compression we aim at minimizing the bitrate of a sample while also minimizing the amount of distortion according to a given metric, ideally correlated with human perception. Audio codecs typically employ a carefully engineered pipeline combining an encoder and a decoder to remove redundancies in the audio content and yield a compact bitstream. Traditionally, this is achieved by decomposing the input with a signal processing transform and trading off the quality of the components that are less likely to influence perception. Leveraging neural networks as trained transforms via an encoder-decoder mechanism has been explored by Morishima et al. (1990); Rippel et al. (2019); Zeghidour et al. (2021). Our research work is in the continuity of this line of work, with a focus on audio signals.
items.zh: 最近的研究表明，流媒体音频和视频在2021年占据了互联网流量的大部分（根据Cisco (2021)的数据为82%）。随着互联网流量预计将继续增长，音频压缩成为一个日益重要的问题。在有损信号压缩中，我们旨在最小化样本的比特率，同时根据给定指标（理想情况下与人类感知相关）最小化失真量。音频编解码器通常采用精心设计的流水线，结合编码器和解码器来消除音频内容中的冗余并生成紧凑的比特流。传统上，这是通过使用信号处理变换分解输入，并权衡那些不太可能影响感知的组件的质量来实现的。利用神经网络作为训练变换，通过编码器-解码器机制，已被Morishima等人(1990)、Rippel等人(2019)和Zeghidour等人(2021)探索。我们的研究工作延续了这一方向，重点关注音频信号。

items.en: The problems arising in lossy neural compression models are twofold: first, the model has to represent a wide range of signals, such as not to overfit the training set or produce artifact laden audio outside its comfort zone. We solve this by having a large and diverse training set (described in Section 4.1), as well as discriminator networks (see Section 3.4) that serve as perceptual losses, which we study extensively in Section 4.5.1, Table 2. The other problem is that of compressing efficiently, both in compute time and in size. For the former, we limit ourselves to models that run in real-time on a single CPU core. For the latter, we use residual vector quantization of the neural encoder floating-point output, for which various approaches have been proposed (Van Den Oord et al., 2017; Zeghidour et al., 2021).
items.zh: 有损神经压缩模型中出现的问题有两个：首先，模型必须表示广泛的信号，以免过拟合训练集或在舒适区外产生充满伪影的音频。我们通过使用大规模且多样化的训练集（在第4.1节中描述）以及作为感知损失的判别器网络（见第3.4节）来解决这个问题，我们在第4.5.1节表2中对此进行了广泛研究。另一个问题是高效压缩，包括计算时间和大小。对于前者，我们限制模型在单个CPU核心上实时运行。对于后者，我们使用神经编码器浮点输出的残差向量量化，对此已有多种方法提出（Van Den Oord等人，2017；Zeghidour等人，2021）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: EnCodec : an encoder decoder codec architecture which is trained with reconstruction (ℓfsubscriptℓ𝑓\ell_{f} and ℓtsubscriptℓ𝑡\ell_{t}) as well as adversarial losses (ℓgsubscriptℓ𝑔\ell_{g} for the generator and ℓdsubscriptℓ𝑑\ell_{d} for the discriminator). The residual vector quantization commitment loss (ℓwsubscriptℓ𝑤\ell_{w}) applies only to the encoder. Optionally, we train a small Transformer language model for entropy coding over the quantized units with ℓlsubscriptℓ𝑙\ell_{l}, which reduces bandwidth even further.
items.capZh: 图1：EnCodec：一种编码器-解码器编解码器架构，使用重建损失（ℓf和ℓt）以及对抗损失（生成器的ℓg和判别器的ℓd）进行训练。残差向量量化承诺损失（ℓw）仅适用于编码器。可选地，我们训练一个小型Transformer语言模型，用于对量化单元进行熵编码，使用ℓl，这进一步降低了带宽。

items.en: Accompanying those technical contributions, we posit that designing end-to-end neural compression models is a set of intertwined choices, among which at least the encoder-decoder architecture, the quantization method, and the perceptual loss play key parts. Objective evaluations exist and we report scores on them in our ablations (Section 4.5.1). But the evaluation of lossy audio codecs necessarily relies on human perception, so we ran extensive human evaluation for multiple points in this design space, both for speech and music. Those evaluations (MUSHRA) consist in having humans listen to, compare, and rate excerpts of speech or music compressed with competitive codecs and variants of our method, and the uncompressed ground truth. This allows to compare variants of the whole pipeline in isolation, as well as their combined effect, in Section 4.5.1 (Figure 3 and Table 1). Finally, our best model, EnCodec , reaches state-of-the-art scores for speech and for music at 1.5, 3, 6, 12 kbps at 24 kHz, and at 6, 12, and 24 kbps for 48 kHz with stereo channels.
items.zh: 伴随这些技术贡献，我们认为设计端到端神经压缩模型是一系列相互交织的选择，其中至少编码器-解码器架构、量化方法和感知损失起着关键作用。存在客观评估，我们在消融实验（第4.5.1节）中报告了这些分数。但有损音频编解码器的评估必然依赖于人类感知，因此我们针对设计空间中的多个点进行了广泛的人类评估，包括语音和音乐。这些评估（MUSHRA）包括让人类聆听、比较和评分使用竞争编解码器和我们方法变体压缩的语音或音乐片段，以及未压缩的原始音频。这允许在第4.5.1节（图3和表1）中单独比较整个流水线的变体及其组合效果。最后，我们的最佳模型EnCodec在24 kHz下1.5、3、6、12 kbps以及48 kHz立体声通道下6、12和24 kbps的语音和音乐上达到了最先进的分数。

items.en: Speech and Audio Synthesis. Recent advancements in neural audio generation enabled computers to efficiently generate natural sounding audio. The first convincing results were achieved by autoregressive models such as WaveNet (Oord et al., 2016), at the cost of slow inference. While many other approaches were explored (Yamamoto et al., 2020a; Kalchbrenner et al., 2018; Goel et al., 2022), the most relevant ones here are those based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) (Kumar et al., 2019; Yamamoto et al., 2020a; Kong et al., 2020; Andreev et al., 2022) were able to match the quality of autoregressive by combining various adversarial networks operate at different multi-scale and multi-period resolutions. Our work uses and extends similar adversarial losses to limit artifacts during audio generation.
items.zh: 语音和音频合成。神经音频生成的最新进展使计算机能够高效生成自然听感的音频。最初令人信服的结果是由自回归模型（如WaveNet（Oord等人，2016））实现的，但代价是推理速度慢。虽然探索了许多其他方法（Yamamoto等人，2020a；Kalchbrenner等人，2018；Goel等人，2022），但这里最相关的是基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法（Kumar等人，2019；Yamamoto等人，2020a；Kong等人，2020；Andreev等人，2022），它们通过结合在不同多尺度和多周期分辨率下运行的多种对抗网络，能够匹配自回归模型的质量。我们的工作使用并扩展了类似的对抗损失，以限制音频生成过程中的伪影。

items.en: Audio Codec. Low bitrate parametric speech and audio codecs have long been studied (Atal & Hanauer, 1971; Juang & Gray, 1982), but their quality has been severely limited. Despite some advances (Griffin & Lim, 1985; McCree et al., 1996), modeling the excitation signal has remained a challenging task. The current state-of-the-art traditional audio codecs are Opus (Valin et al., 2012) and Enhanced Voice Service (EVS) (Dietz et al., 2015). These methods produce high coding efficiency for general audio while supporting various bitrates, sampling rates, and real-time compression.
items.zh: 音频编解码器。低比特率参数化语音和音频编解码器已被研究多年（Atal & Hanauer, 1971；Juang & Gray, 1982），但其质量受到严重限制。尽管取得了一些进展（Griffin & Lim, 1985；McCree等人，1996），但激励信号的建模仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。目前最先进的传统音频编解码器是Opus（Valin等人，2012）和增强语音服务（EVS）（Dietz等人，2015）。这些方法在支持各种比特率、采样率和实时压缩的同时，为通用音频提供了高编码效率。

items.en: Neural based audio codecs have been recently proposed and demonstrated promising results (Kleijn et al., 2018; Valin & Skoglund, 2019b; Lim et al., 2020; Kleijn et al., 2021; Zeghidour et al., 2021; Omran et al., 2022; Lin et al., 2022; Jayashankar et al., 2022; Li et al., ; Jiang et al., 2022), where most methods are based on quantizing the latent space before feeding it to the decoder. In Valin & Skoglund (2019b), an LPCNet (Valin & Skoglund, 2019a) vocoder was conditioned on hand-crafted features and a uniform quantizer. Gârbacea et al. (2019) conditioned a WaveNet based model on discrete units obtained from a VQ-VAE (Van Den Oord et al., 2017; Razavi et al., 2019) model, while Skoglund & Valin (2019) tried feeding the Opus codec (Valin et al., 2012) to a WaveNet to further improve its perceptual quality. Jayashankar et al. (2022); Jiang et al. (2022) propose an auto-encoder with a vector quantization layer applied over the latent representation and minimizing the reconstruction loss, while Li et al. suggested using Gumbel-Softmax (GS) (Jang et al., 2017) for representation quantization. The most relevant related work to ours is the SoundStream model (Zeghidour et al., 2021), in which the authors propose a fully convolutional encoder decoder architecture with a Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) (Gray, 1984; Vasuki & Vanathi, 2006) layers. The model was optimized using both reconstruction loss and adversarial perceptual losses.
items.zh: 基于神经网络的音频编解码器最近被提出并展示了有希望的结果（Kleijn等人，2018；Valin & Skoglund, 2019b；Lim等人，2020；Kleijn等人，2021；Zeghidour等人，2021；Omran等人，2022；Lin等人，2022；Jayashankar等人，2022；Li等人；Jiang等人，2022），其中大多数方法基于在将潜空间馈送到解码器之前对其进行量化。在Valin & Skoglund (2019b)中，LPCNet（Valin & Skoglund, 2019a）声码器以手工特征和均匀量化器为条件。Gârbacea等人(2019)以从VQ-VAE（Van Den Oord等人，2017；Razavi等人，2019）模型获得的离散单元为条件，训练基于WaveNet的模型，而Skoglund & Valin (2019)尝试将Opus编解码器（Valin等人，2012）馈送到WaveNet以进一步提高其感知质量。Jayashankar等人(2022)；Jiang等人(2022)提出了一种自编码器，在潜表示上应用向量量化层并最小化重建损失，而Li等人建议使用Gumbel-Softmax（GS）（Jang等人，2017）进行表示量化。与我们最相关的工作是SoundStream模型（Zeghidour等人，2021），其中作者提出了一种全卷积编码器-解码器架构，带有残差向量量化（RVQ）（Gray, 1984；Vasuki & Vanathi, 2006）层。该模型使用重建损失和对抗感知损失进行优化。

items.en: Audio Discretization. Representing audio and speech using discrete values was proposed to various tasks recently. Dieleman et al. (2018); Dhariwal et al. (2020) proposed a hierarchical VQ-VAE based model for learning discrete representation of raw audio, next combined with an auto-regressive model, demonstrating the ability to generate high quality music. Similarly, Lakhotia et al. (2021); Kharitonov et al. (2021) demonstrated that self-supervised learning methods for speech (e.g., HuBERT (Hsu et al., 2021)), can be quantized and used for conditional and unconditional speech generation. Similar methods were applied to speech resynthesis (Polyak et al., 2021), speech emotion conversion (Kreuk et al., 2021), spoken dialog system (Nguyen et al., 2022), and speech-to-speech translation (Lee et al., 2021a; b; Popuri et al., 2022).
items.zh: 音频离散化。使用离散值表示音频和语音最近被提出用于各种任务。Dieleman等人(2018)；Dhariwal等人(2020)提出了一种基于分层VQ-VAE的模型，用于学习原始音频的离散表示，然后与自回归模型结合，展示了生成高质量音乐的能力。类似地，Lakhotia等人(2021)；Kharitonov等人(2021)证明了语音的自监督学习方法（例如HuBERT（Hsu等人，2021））可以被量化并用于条件和非条件语音生成。类似方法已应用于语音重合成（Polyak等人，2021）、语音情感转换（Kreuk等人，2021）、口语对话系统（Nguyen等人，2022）和语音到语音翻译（Lee等人，2021a; b；Popuri等人，2022）。

items.en: An audio signal of duration d𝑑d can be represented by a sequence 𝒙∈[−1,1]Ca×T𝒙superscript11subscript𝐶a𝑇\bm{x}\in[-1,1]^{C_{\mathrm{a}}\times T} with Casubscript𝐶aC_{\mathrm{a}} the number of audio channels, T=d⋅fsr𝑇⋅𝑑subscript𝑓srT=d\cdot f_{\mathrm{sr}} the number of audio samples at a given sample rate fsrsubscript𝑓srf_{\mathrm{sr}}. The EnCodec model is composed of three main components: (i) First, an encoder network E𝐸E is input an audio extract and outputs a latent representation 𝒛𝒛\bm{z}; (ii) Next, a quantization layer Q𝑄Q produces a compressed representation 𝒛qsubscript𝒛𝑞\bm{z}_{q}, using vector quantization; (iii) Lastly, a decoder network G𝐺G reconstructs the time-domain signal, 𝒙^^𝒙\hat{\bm{x}}, from the compressed latent representation 𝒛qsubscript𝒛𝑞\bm{z}_{q}. The whole system is trained end-to-end to minimize a reconstruction loss applied over both time and frequency domain, together with a perceptual loss in the form of discriminators operating at different resolutions. A visual description of the proposed method can be seen in Figure 1.
items.zh: 持续时间为d的音频信号可以表示为序列x∈[-1,1]^{Ca×T}，其中Ca是音频通道数，T=d·fsr是在给定采样率fsr下的音频样本数。EnCodec模型由三个主要组件组成：(i) 首先，编码器网络E输入音频片段并输出潜表示z；(ii) 其次，量化层Q使用向量量化生成压缩表示zq；(iii) 最后，解码器网络G从压缩潜表示zq重建时域信号x̂。整个系统以端到端方式训练，最小化应用于时域和频域的重建损失，以及以不同分辨率运行的判别器形式的感知损失。所提出方法的视觉描述见图1。

items.en: The EnCodec model is a simple streaming, convolutional-based encoder-decoder architecture with sequential modeling component applied over the latent representation, both on the encoder and on the decoder side. Such modeling framework was shown to provide great results in various audio-related tasks, e.g., source separation and enhancement (Défossez et al., 2019; Defossez et al., 2020), neural vocoders (Kumar et al., 2019; Kong et al., 2020), audio codec (Zeghidour et al., 2021), and artificial bandwidth extension (Tagliasacchi et al., 2020; Li et al., 2021). We use the same architecture for 24 kHz and 48 kHz audio.
items.zh: EnCodec模型是一种简单的流式、基于卷积的编码器-解码器架构，在编码器和解码器侧均对潜表示应用序列建模组件。这种建模框架已在各种音频相关任务中显示出优异结果，例如源分离和增强（Défossez等人，2019；Defossez等人，2020）、神经声码器（Kumar等人，2019；Kong等人，2020）、音频编解码器（Zeghidour等人，2021）和人工带宽扩展（Tagliasacchi等人，2020；Li等人，2021）。我们对24 kHz和48 kHz音频使用相同的架构。

items.en: Encoder-Decoder. The encoder model E𝐸E consists in a 1D convolution with C𝐶C channels and a kernel size of 7 followed by B𝐵B convolution blocks. Each convolution block is composed of a single residual unit followed by a down-sampling layer consisting in a strided convolution, with a kernel size K𝐾K of twice the stride S𝑆S. The residual unit contains two convolutions with kernel size 3 and a skip-connection. The number of channels is doubled whenever down-sampling occurred. The convolution blocks are followed by a two-layer LSTM for sequence modeling and a final 1D convolution layer with a kernel size of 7 and D𝐷D output channels. Following Zeghidour et al. (2021); Li et al. (2021), we use C𝐶C = 32, B𝐵B = 4 and (2, 4, 5, 8) as strides. We use ELU as a non-linear activation function (Clevert et al., 2015) either layer normalization (Ba et al., 2016) or weight normalization (Salimans & Kingma, 2016). We use two variants of the model, depending on whether we target the low-latency streamable setup, or a high fidelity non-streamable usage. With this setup, the encoder outputs 75 latent steps per second of audio at 24 kHz, and 150 at 48 kHz. The decoder mirrors the encoder, using transposed convolutions instead of strided convolutions, and with the strides in reverse order as in the encoder, outputting the final mono or stereo audio.
items.zh: 编码器-解码器。编码器模型E由一个具有C个通道和内核大小7的1D卷积，后跟B个卷积块组成。每个卷积块由一个残差单元和一个下采样层组成，下采样层由步长卷积构成，内核大小K是步长S的两倍。残差单元包含两个内核大小为3的卷积和一个跳跃连接。每当发生下采样时，通道数加倍。卷积块后跟一个两层LSTM用于序列建模，以及一个最终的内核大小为7和D个输出通道的1D卷积层。遵循Zeghidour等人(2021)；Li等人(2021)，我们使用C=32，B=4和(2, 4, 5, 8)作为步长。我们使用ELU作为非线性激活函数（Clevert等人，2015），以及层归一化（Ba等人，2016）或权重归一化（Salimans & Kingma, 2016）。我们使用模型的两种变体，取决于目标是低延迟流式设置还是高保真非流式使用。通过此设置，编码器在24 kHz下每秒输出75个潜步，在48 kHz下输出150个。解码器镜像编码器，使用转置卷积代替步长卷积，步长顺序与编码器相反，输出最终的单声道或立体声音频。

items.en: Non-streamable. In the non-streamable setup, we use for each convolution a total padding of K−S𝐾𝑆K-S, split equally before the first time step and after the last one (with one more before if K−S𝐾𝑆K-S is odd). We further split the input into chunks of 1 seconds, with an overlap of 10 ms to avoid clicks, and normalize each chunk before feeding it to the model, applying the inverse operation on the output of the decoder, adding a negligible bandwidth overhead to transmit the scale. We use layer normalization (Ba et al., 2016), computing the statistics including also the time dimension in order to keep the relative scale information.
items.zh: 非流式。在非流式设置中，我们对每个卷积使用总填充K-S，在第一个时间步之前和最后一个时间步之后平均分配（如果K-S为奇数，则在之前多一个）。我们进一步将输入分成1秒的块，重叠10毫秒以避免咔嗒声，并在馈送到模型之前归一化每个块，在解码器输出上应用逆操作，增加可忽略的带宽开销以传输尺度。我们使用层归一化（Ba等人，2016），计算统计量时也包括时间维度，以保持相对尺度信息。

items.en: Streamable. For the streamable setup, all padding is put before the first time step. For a transposed convolution with stride s𝑠s, we output the s𝑠s first time steps, and keep the remaining s𝑠s steps in memory for completion when the next frame is available, or discarding it at the end of a stream. Thanks to this padding scheme, the model can output 320 samples (13 ms) as soon as the first 320 samples (13 ms) are received. We replace the layer normalization with statistics computed over the time dimension with weight normalization (Salimans & Kingma, 2016), as the former is ill-suited for a streaming setup. We notice a small gain over the objective metrics by keeping a form of normalization, as demonstrated in Table A.3.
items.zh: 流式。对于流式设置，所有填充都放在第一个时间步之前。对于步长为s的转置卷积，我们输出前s个时间步，并将剩余的s个步保存在内存中，以便在下一个帧可用时完成，或在流结束时丢弃。由于这种填充方案，模型可以在接收到前320个样本（13毫秒）后立即输出320个样本（13毫秒）。我们将层归一化替换为使用权重归一化（Salimans & Kingma, 2016）计算的统计量（在时间维度上），因为前者不适合流式设置。我们注意到，通过保持某种形式的归一化，在客观指标上获得了小幅提升，如表A.3所示。

items.en: We use Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) to quantize the output of the encoder as introduced by Zeghidour et al. (2021). Vector quantization consists in projecting an input vector onto the closest entry in a codebook of a given size. RVQ refines this process by computing the residual after quantization, and further quantizing it using a second codebook, and so forth.
items.zh: 我们使用残差向量量化（RVQ）来量化编码器的输出，如Zeghidour等人(2021)所引入。向量量化包括将输入向量投影到给定大小的码本中最接近的条目上。RVQ通过计算量化后的残差，并使用第二个码本进一步量化它，以此类推，来细化此过程。

items.en: We follow the same training procedure as described by Dhariwal et al. (2020) and Zeghidour et al. (2021). The codebook entry selected for each input is updated using an exponential moving average with a decay of 0.99, and entries that are not used are replaced with a candidate sampled from the current batch. We use a straight-through-estimator (Bengio et al., 2013) to compute the gradient of the encoder, e.g. as if the quantization step was the identity function during the backward phase. Finally, a commitment loss, consisting of the MSE between the input of the quantizer and its output, with gradient only computed with respect to its input, is added to the overall training loss.
items.zh: 我们遵循Dhariwal等人(2020)和Zeghidour等人(2021)描述的相同训练过程。为每个输入选择的码本条目使用指数移动平均更新，衰减率为0.99，未使用的条目被替换为从当前批次中采样的候选。我们使用直通估计器（Bengio等人，2013）来计算编码器的梯度，例如，在反向传播阶段，量化步骤被视为恒等函数。最后，在整体训练损失中添加承诺损失，由量化器输入和输出之间的MSE组成，梯度仅相对于其输入计算。

items.en: By selecting a variable number of residual steps at train time, a single model can be used to support multiple bandwidth target (Zeghidour et al., 2021). For all of our models, we use at most 32 codebooks (16 for the 48 kHz models) with 1024 entries each, e.g. 10 bits per codebook. When doing variable bandwidth training, we select randomly a number of codebooks as a multiple of 4, i.e. corresponding to a bandwidth 1.5, 3, 6, 12 or 24 kbps at 24 kHz. Given a continuous latent represention with shape [B,D,T]𝐵𝐷𝑇[B,D,T] that comes out of the encoder, this procedure turns it into a discrete set of indexes [B,Nq,T]𝐵subscript𝑁𝑞𝑇[B,N_{q},T] with Nqsubscript𝑁𝑞N_{q} the number of codebooks selected. This discrete representation can changed again to a vector by summing the corresponding codebook entries, which is done just before going into the decoder.
items.zh: 通过在训练时选择可变数量的残差步骤，单个模型可用于支持多个带宽目标（Zeghidour等人，2021）。对于我们的所有模型，我们最多使用32个码本（48 kHz模型为16个），每个码本有1024个条目，即每个码本10位。在进行可变带宽训练时，我们随机选择码本数量作为4的倍数，即对应于24 kHz下1.5、3、6、12或24 kbps的带宽。给定来自编码器的形状为[B,D,T]的连续潜表示，此过程将其转换为离散索引集[B,Nq,T]，其中Nq是选择的码本数量。此离散表示可以通过求和相应的码本条目再次转换为向量，这在进入解码器之前完成。

items.en: We additionally train a small Transformer based language model (Vaswani et al., 2017) with the objective of keeping faster than real time end-to-end compression/decompression on a single CPU core. The model consists of 5 layers, 8 heads, 200 channels, a dimension of 800 for the feed-forward blocks, and no dropout. At train time, we select a bandwidth and the corresponding number of codebooks Nqsubscript𝑁𝑞N_{q}. For a time step t𝑡t, the discrete representation obtained at time t−1𝑡1t-1 is transformed into a continuous representation using learnt embedding tables, one for each codebook, and which are summed. For t=0𝑡0t=0, a special token is used instead. The output of the Transformer is fed into Nqsubscript𝑁𝑞N_{q} linear layers with as many output channels as the cardinality of each codebook (e.g. 1024), giving us the logits of the estimated distribution over each codebook for time t𝑡t. We thus neglect potential mutual information between the codebooks at a single time step. This allows to speedup inference (as opposed to having one time step per codebook, or a multi-stage prediction) with a limited impact over the final cross entropy. Each attention layer has a causal receptive field of 3.5 seconds, and we offset by a random amount the initial position of the sinusoidal position embedding to emulate being in a longer sequence. We train the model on sequences of 5 seconds.
items.zh: 我们还训练了一个基于Transformer的小型语言模型（Vaswani等人，2017），目标是在单个CPU核心上保持快于实时的端到端压缩/解压缩。该模型由5层、8个头、200个通道、前馈块维度800组成，无dropout。在训练时，我们选择一个带宽和相应的码本数量Nq。对于时间步t，在时间t-1获得的离散表示使用学习的嵌入表（每个码本一个）转换为连续表示，并求和。对于t=0，使用特殊标记。Transformer的输出被馈送到Nq个线性层，每个线性层具有与每个码本基数相同的输出通道数（例如1024），从而给出时间t每个码本估计分布的logits。因此，我们忽略了单个时间步上码本之间的潜在互信息。这允许加速推理（相对于每个码本一个时间步或多阶段预测），而对最终交叉熵的影响有限。每个注意力层具有3.5秒的因果感受野，并且我们随机偏移正弦位置嵌入的初始位置，以模拟处于更长序列中。我们在5秒的序列上训练模型。

items.en: Entropy Encoding. We use a range based arithmetic coder (Pasco, 1976; Rissanen & Langdon, 1981) in order to leverage the estimated probabilities given by the language model. As noted by Ballé et al. (2018), evaluation of the same model might lead to different results on different architectures, or with different evaluation procedures due to floating point approximations. This can lead to decoding errors as the encoder and decoder will not use the exact same code. We observe in particular that the difference between batch evaluation (e.g. all time steps at once), and the real-life streaming evaluation that occurs in the decoder can lead to difference larger than 10−8superscript10810^{-8}. We first round the estimated probabilities with a precision of 10−6superscript10610^{-6}, although evaluations in more contexts would be needed for practical deployment. We use a total range width of 224superscript2242^{24}, and assign a minimum range width of 2. We discuss the impact on the processing time in Section 4.6.
items.zh: 熵编码。我们使用基于范围的算术编码器（Pasco, 1976；Rissanen & Langdon, 1981）来利用语言模型给出的估计概率。如Ballé等人(2018)所指出的，由于浮点近似，同一模型在不同架构上或使用不同评估程序可能导致不同结果。这可能导致解码错误，因为编码器和解码器不会使用完全相同的代码。我们特别观察到，批量评估（例如所有时间步同时进行）与解码器中发生的实际流式评估之间的差异可能导致大于10^{-8}的差异。我们首先将估计概率四舍五入到10^{-6}的精度，尽管实际部署需要更多上下文中的评估。我们使用总范围宽度2^{24}，并分配最小范围宽度2。我们在第4.6节讨论对处理时间的影响。

items.capEn: Figure 2: MS-STFT Discriminator architecture. The input to the network is a complex-valued STFT with the real and imaginary parts concatenated. Each discriminator is composed of a 2D convolutional layer, followed by 2D convolutions with increasing dilation rates. Then a final 2D convolution is applied.
items.capZh: 图2：MS-STFT判别器架构。网络的输入是复数STFT，其实部和虚部拼接在一起。每个判别器由一个2D卷积层组成，后跟具有递增膨胀率的2D卷积。然后应用最终的2D卷积。

items.en: We detail the training objective that combines a reconstruction loss term, a perceptual loss term (via discriminators), and the RVQ commitment loss.
items.zh: 我们详细介绍了训练目标，该目标结合了重建损失项、感知损失项（通过判别器）和RVQ承诺损失。

items.en: Reconstruction Loss. The reconstruction loss term is comprised of a time and a frequency domain loss term. We minimize the L1 distance between the target and compressed audio over the time domain, i.e. ℓt​(𝒙,𝒙^)=‖𝒙−𝒙^‖1subscriptℓ𝑡𝒙^𝒙subscriptnorm𝒙^𝒙1\ell_{t}(\bm{x},\hat{\bm{x}})=\|\bm{x}-\hat{\bm{x}}\|_{1}. For the frequency domain, we use a linear combination between the L1 and L2 losses over the mel-spectrogram using several time scales (Yamamoto et al., 2020b; Gritsenko et al., 2020). Formally,
items.zh: 重建损失。重建损失项由时域和频域损失项组成。我们最小化时域上目标音频与压缩音频之间的L1距离，即 ℓt(𝒙,𝒙^)=‖𝒙−𝒙^‖1。对于频域，我们使用多个时间尺度上梅尔频谱图的L1和L2损失的线性组合（Yamamoto等人，2020b；Gritsenko等人，2020）。形式上，

items.en: where 𝒮isubscript𝒮𝑖\mathcal{S}_{i} is a 64-bins mel-spectrogram using a normalized STFT with window size of 2isuperscript2𝑖2^{i} and hop length of 2i/4superscript2𝑖42^{i}/4, e=5,…,11𝑒5…11e={5,\ldots,11} is the set of scales, and α𝛼\alpha represents the set of scalar coefficients balancing between the L1 and L2 terms. Unlike Gritsenko et al. (2020), we take αi=1subscript𝛼𝑖1\alpha_{i}=1.
items.zh: 其中 𝒮i 是使用归一化STFT的64频段梅尔频谱图，窗口大小为 2^i，跳跃长度为 2^i/4，e=5,…,11 是尺度集合，α 表示平衡L1和L2项的标量系数集合。与Gritsenko等人（2020）不同，我们取 αi=1。

items.en: Discriminative Loss. To further improve the quality of the generated samples, we introduce a perceptual loss term based on a multi-scale STFT-based (MS-STFT) discriminator, illustrated in Figure 2. Multi scale discriminators are popular for capturing different structures in audio signals (Kumar et al., 2019; Kong et al., 2020; You et al., 2021). The MS-STFT discriminator consists in identically structured networks operating on multi-scaled complex-valued STFT with the real and imaginary parts concatenated. Each sub-network is composed of a 2D convolutional layer (using kernel size 3 x 8 with 32 channels), followed by 2D convolutions with increasing dilation rates in the time dimension of 1, 2 and 4, and a stride of 2 over the frequency axis. A final 2D convolution with kernel size 3 x 3 and stride (1, 1) provide the final prediction. We use 5 different scales with STFT window lengths of [2048, 1024, 512, 256, 128]. For 48 kHz audio, we double the size of each STFT window and train the discriminator every two batches, and for stereophonic audio, we process separately the left and right channels. We use LeakyReLU as a non-linear activation function and apply weight normalization (Salimans & Kingma, 2016) to our discriminator network. The MS-STFT discriminator model architecture is visually depicted in Figure 2.
items.zh: 判别损失。为了进一步提高生成样本的质量，我们引入了一个基于多尺度STFT（MS-STFT）判别器的感知损失项，如图2所示。多尺度判别器常用于捕获音频信号中的不同结构（Kumar等人，2019；Kong等人，2020；You等人，2021）。MS-STFT判别器由结构相同的网络组成，这些网络对多尺度复数STFT（实部和虚部拼接）进行操作。每个子网络由一个2D卷积层（使用3x8内核，32通道）组成，随后是在时间维度上膨胀率递增（1、2和4）的2D卷积，以及在频率轴上的步长为2。最后使用内核大小为3x3、步长为(1,1)的2D卷积提供最终预测。我们使用5种不同的尺度，STFT窗口长度为[2048, 1024, 512, 256, 128]。对于48 kHz音频，我们将每个STFT窗口的大小加倍，并每两个批次训练一次判别器；对于立体声音频，我们分别处理左右声道。我们使用LeakyReLU作为非线性激活函数，并对判别器网络应用权重归一化（Salimans & Kingma, 2016）。MS-STFT判别器模型架构如图2所示。

Similarly to previous work on neural vocoders (Kumar et al., 2019; Kong et al., 2020; You et al., 2021), we additionally include a relative feature matching loss for the generator. Formally,

The discriminators are trained to minimize the following hinge-loss adversarial loss function: Ld​(𝒙,𝒙^)=1K​∑k=1Kmax⁡(0,1−Dk​(𝒙))+max⁡(0,1+Dk​(𝒙^))subscript𝐿𝑑𝒙^𝒙1𝐾superscriptsubscript𝑘1𝐾01subscript𝐷𝑘𝒙01subscript𝐷𝑘^𝒙L_{d}(\bm{x},\hat{\bm{x}})=\frac{1}{K}\sum_{k=1}^{K}\max(0,1-D_{k}(\bm{x}))+\max(0,1+D_{k}(\hat{\bm{x}})), where K𝐾K is the number of discriminators. Given that the discriminator tend to overpower easily the decoder, we update its weight with a probability of 2/3 at 24 kHz, and 0.5 at 48 kHz.

items.en: Multi-bandwidth training. At 24 kHz, we train the model to support the bandwidths 1.5, 3, 6, 12, and 24 kbps by selecting the appropriate number of codebooks to keep in the RVQ step, as explained in Section 3.2. At 48 kHz, we train to support 3, 6, 12 and 24 kbps. We also noticed that using a dedicated discriminator per-bandwidth is beneficial to the audio quality. Thus, we select a given bandwidth for the entire batch, and evaluate and update only the corresponding discriminator.
items.zh: 多带宽训练。在24 kHz时，我们通过选择RVQ步骤中保留的适当码本数量来训练模型支持1.5、3、6、12和24 kbps的带宽，如第3.2节所述。在48 kHz时，我们训练支持3、6、12和24 kbps。我们还注意到，为每个带宽使用专用的判别器有利于音频质量。因此，我们为整个批次选择给定的带宽，并仅评估和更新相应的判别器。

items.en: VQ commitment loss. As mentioned in Section 3.2, we add a commitment loss lwsubscript𝑙𝑤l_{w} between the output of the encoder, and its quantized value, with no gradient being computed for the quantized value. For each residual step c∈{1,…​C}𝑐1…𝐶c\in\{1,\ldots C\} (with C𝐶C depeding on the bandwidth target for the current batch), noting 𝒛csubscript𝒛𝑐\bm{z}_{c} the current residual and qc​(𝒛c)subscript𝑞𝑐subscript𝒛𝑐q_{c}(\bm{z}_{c}) the nearest entry in the corresponding codebook, we define lwsubscript𝑙𝑤l_{w} as

items.en: Balancer. We introduce a loss balancer in order to stabilize training, in particular the varying scale of the gradients coming from the discriminators. We also find that the balancer makes it easier to reason about the different loss weights, independently of their scale. Let us take a number of losses (ℓi)isubscriptsubscriptℓ𝑖𝑖(\ell_{i})_{i} that depends only on the output of the model x^^𝑥\hat{x}. We define gi=∂ℓi∂x^subscript𝑔𝑖subscriptℓ𝑖^𝑥g_{i}=\frac{\partial\ell_{i}}{\partial\hat{x}}, and ⟨‖gi‖2⟩βsubscriptdelimited-⟨⟩subscriptnormsubscript𝑔𝑖2𝛽\langle\|g_{i}\|_{2}\rangle_{\beta} the exponential moving average of gisubscript𝑔𝑖g_{i} over the last training batches. Given a set of weights (λi)subscript𝜆𝑖(\lambda_{i}) and a reference norm R𝑅R, we define
items.zh: 平衡器。我们引入了一个损失平衡器以稳定训练，特别是来自判别器的梯度尺度变化。我们还发现平衡器使得更容易理解不同损失权重，而不受其尺度影响。考虑一组仅依赖于模型输出 x^ 的损失 (ℓ_i)_i。我们定义 g_i = ∂ℓ_i/∂x^，以及 ⟨‖g_i‖_2⟩_β 为 g_i 在最近训练批次上的指数移动平均。给定一组权重 (λ_i) 和参考范数 R，我们定义

items.en: We then backpropagate into the network ∑ig~isubscript𝑖subscript~𝑔𝑖\sum_{i}\tilde{g}_{i}, instead of the original ∑iλi​gisubscript𝑖subscript𝜆𝑖subscript𝑔𝑖\sum_{i}\lambda_{i}g_{i}. This changes the optimization problem but allows to make the λisubscript𝜆𝑖\lambda_{i} interpretable irrespectively of the natural scale of each loss. If ∑iλi=1subscript𝑖subscript𝜆𝑖1\sum_{i}\lambda_{i}=1, then each weight can be interpreted as the fraction of the model gradient that come from the corresponding loss. We take R=1𝑅1R=1 and β=0.999𝛽0.999\beta=0.999. All the generator losses from Eq. (4) fit into the balancer, except for the commitment loss, as it is not defined with respect to the output of the model.
items.zh: 然后我们反向传播 ∑_i g̃_i 到网络，而不是原始的 ∑_i λ_i g_i。这改变了优化问题，但使得 λ_i 可解释，而不受每个损失自然尺度的影响。如果 ∑_i λ_i = 1，那么每个权重可以解释为模型梯度中来自相应损失的部分。我们取 R=1 和 β=0.999。方程(4)中的所有生成器损失都适合平衡器，除了承诺损失，因为它不是相对于模型输出定义的。

items.en: We train EnCodec on 24 kHz monophonic across diverse domains, namely: speech, noisy speech, music and general audio while we train the fullband stereo EnCodec on only 48 kHz music. For speech, we use the clean speech segments from DNS Challenge 4 (Dubey et al., 2022) and the Common Voice dataset (Ardila et al., 2019). For general audio, we use on AudioSet (Gemmeke et al., 2017) together with FSD50K (Fonseca et al., 2021). For music, we rely on the Jamendo dataset (Bogdanov et al., 2019) for training and evaluation and we further evaluate our models on music using a proprietary music dataset. Data splits are detailed in Appendix A.1.
items.zh: 我们在24 kHz单声道上训练EnCodec，涵盖多种领域，即：语音、带噪语音、音乐和通用音频，而我们在48 kHz音乐上训练全频带立体声EnCodec。对于语音，我们使用DNS Challenge 4（Dubey等人，2022）中的干净语音片段和Common Voice数据集（Ardila等人，2019）。对于通用音频，我们使用AudioSet（Gemmeke等人，2017）和FSD50K（Fonseca等人，2021）。对于音乐，我们依赖Jamendo数据集（Bogdanov等人，2019）进行训练和评估，并进一步使用专有音乐数据集评估我们的模型。数据划分详见附录A.1。

items.en: For training and validation, we define a mixing strategy which consists in either sampling a single source from a dataset or performing on the fly mixing of two or three sources. Specifically, we have four strategies: (s1) we sample a single source from Jamendo with probability 0.32; (s2) we sample a single source from the other datasets with the same probability; (s3) we mix two sources from all datasets with a probability of 0.24; (s4) we mix three sources from all datasets except music with a probability of 0.12.
items.zh: 对于训练和验证，我们定义了一种混合策略，即从数据集中采样单个源或动态混合两个或三个源。具体来说，我们有四种策略：(s1) 以0.32的概率从Jamendo采样单个源；(s2) 以相同概率从其他数据集采样单个源；(s3) 以0.24的概率从所有数据集混合两个源；(s4) 以0.12的概率从除音乐外的所有数据集混合三个源。

items.en: The audio is normalized by file and we apply a random gain between -10 and 6 dB. We reject any sample that has been clipped. Finally we add reverberation using room impulse responses provided by the DNS challenge with probability 0.2, and RT60 in the range [0.3, 1.3] except for the single-source music samples. For testing, we use four categories: clean speech from DNS alone, clean speech mixed with FSDK50K sample, Jamendo sample alone, proprietary music sample alone.
items.zh: 音频按文件归一化，并应用-10到6 dB之间的随机增益。我们拒绝任何被削波的样本。最后，我们使用DNS挑战提供的房间脉冲响应添加混响，概率为0.2，RT60在[0.3, 1.3]范围内，但单源音乐样本除外。对于测试，我们使用四个类别：仅DNS的干净语音、干净语音与FSDK50K样本混合、仅Jamendo样本、仅专有音乐样本。

items.en: Opus (Valin et al., 2012) is a versatile speech and audio codec standardized by the IETF in 2012. It scales from 6 kbps narrowband monophonic audio to 510 kbps fullband stereophonic audio. EVS (Dietz et al., 2015) is a codec standardized in 2014 by 3GPP and developed for Voice over LTE (VoLTE). It supports a range of bitrates from 5.9 kbps to 128 kbps, and audio bandwidths from 4 kHz to 20 kHz. It is the successor of AMR-WB (Bhagat et al., 2012).We use both codecs to serve as traditional digital signal processing baselines. We also utilize MP3 compression at 64 kbps as an additional baseline for the stereophonic signal compression case. MP3 uses lossy data compression by approximating the accuracy of certain components of sound that are considered to be beyond hearing capabilities of most humans. Finally, we compare EnCodec to the SoundStream model from the official implementation available in Lyra 2 111https://github.com/google/lyra at 3.2 kbps and 6 kbps on audio upsampled to 32 kHz. We also reproduced a version of SoundStream (Zeghidour et al., 2021) with minor improvements. Namely, we use the relative feature loss introduce in Section 3.4, and layer normalization (applied separately for each time step) in the discriminators, except for the first and last layer, which improved the audio quality during our preliminary studies. Results a reported in Table A.2 in the Appendix A.3.
items.zh: Opus（Valin等人，2012）是IETF于2012年标准化的多功能语音和音频编解码器。它从6 kbps窄带单声道音频扩展到510 kbps全频带立体声音频。EVS（Dietz等人，2015）是3GPP于2014年标准化的编解码器，专为VoLTE开发。它支持5.9 kbps到128 kbps的比特率范围，以及4 kHz到20 kHz的音频带宽。它是AMR-WB的继任者（Bhagat等人，2012）。我们使用这两种编解码器作为传统的数字信号处理基线。我们还使用64 kbps的MP3压缩作为立体声信号压缩的额外基线。MP3通过近似被认为超出大多数人听力能力的某些声音成分的精度来使用有损数据压缩。最后，我们将EnCodec与Lyra 2官方实现中可用的SoundStream模型进行比较，该模型在3.2 kbps和6 kbps下对重采样至32 kHz的音频进行测试。我们还复现了一个略有改进的SoundStream版本（Zeghidour等人，2021）。即，我们使用了第3.4节中介绍的相对特征损失，并在判别器中使用了层归一化（每个时间步单独应用），除了第一层和最后一层，这在我们初步研究中提高了音频质量。结果见附录A.3中的表A.2。

items.en: We consider both subjective and objective evaluation metrics. For the subjective tests we follow the MUSHRA protocol (Series, 2014), using both a hidden reference and a low anchor. Annotators were recruited using a crowd-sourcing platform, in which they were asked to rate the perceptual quality of the provided samples in a range between 1 to 100. We randomly select 50 samples of 5 seconds from each category of the the test set and force at least 10 annotations per samples. To filter noisy annotations and outliers we remove annotators who rate the reference recordings less then 90 in at least 20% of the cases, or rate the low-anchor recording above 80 more than 50% of the time. For objective metrics, we use ViSQOL (Hines et al., 2012; Chinen et al., 2020) 222We compute visqol with: https://github.com/google/visqol using the recommended recipes., together with the Scale-Invariant Signal-to-Noise Ration (SI-SNR) (Luo & Mesgarani, 2019; Nachmani et al., 2020; Chazan et al., 2021).
items.zh: 我们考虑了主观和客观评估指标。对于主观测试，我们遵循MUSHRA协议（Series, 2014），同时使用隐藏参考和低锚点。通过众包平台招募标注者，要求他们对提供的样本在1到100的范围内对感知质量进行评分。我们从测试集的每个类别中随机选择50个5秒样本，并强制每个样本至少10个标注。为了过滤噪声标注和异常值，我们移除在至少20%的情况下参考录音评分低于90的标注者，或在超过50%的情况下低锚点录音评分高于80的标注者。对于客观指标，我们使用ViSQOL（Hines等人，2012；Chinen等人，2020）以及尺度不变信噪比（SI-SNR）（Luo & Mesgarani, 2019；Nachmani等人，2020；Chazan等人，2021）。

items.en: We train all models for 300 epochs, with one epoch being 2,000 updates with the Adam optimizer with a batch size of 64 examples of 1 second each, a learning rate of 3⋅10−4⋅3superscript1043\cdot 10^{-4}, β1=0.5subscript𝛽10.5\beta_{1}=0.5, and β2=0.9subscript𝛽20.9\beta_{2}=0.9. All the models are traind using 8 A100 GPUs. We use the balancer introduced in Section 3.4 with weights λt=0.1subscript𝜆𝑡0.1\lambda_{t}=0.1, λf=1subscript𝜆𝑓1\lambda_{f}=1, λg=3subscript𝜆𝑔3\lambda_{g}=3, λfeat=3subscript𝜆feat3\lambda_{\mathrm{feat}}=3 for the 24 kHz models. For the 48 kHz model, we use instead λg=4subscript𝜆𝑔4\lambda_{g}=4, λfeat=4subscript𝜆feat4\lambda_{\mathrm{feat}}=4.
items.zh: 我们训练所有模型300个epoch，每个epoch为2000次更新，使用Adam优化器，批次大小为64个1秒样本，学习率为3×10^{-4}，β1=0.5，β2=0.9。所有模型使用8块A100 GPU训练。我们使用第3.4节中介绍的平衡器，对于24 kHz模型，权重为λ_t=0.1，λ_f=1，λ_g=3，λ_feat=3。对于48 kHz模型，我们使用λ_g=4，λ_feat=4。

items.en: We start with the results for EnCodec with a bandwidth in {1.5,3,6,12}1.53612\{1.5,3,6,12\} kbps and compare them to the baselines. Results for the streamable setup are reported in Figure 3 and a breakdown per category in Table 1. We additionally explored other quantizers such as Gumbel-Softmax and DiffQ (see details in Appendix A.2), however, we found in preliminary results that they provide similar or worse results, hence we do not report them.
items.zh: 我们从带宽为{1.5,3,6,12} kbps的EnCodec结果开始，并将其与基线进行比较。可流式设置的结果如图3所示，每个类别的细分见表1。我们还探索了其他量化器，如Gumbel-Softmax和DiffQ（详见附录A.2），然而，我们在初步结果中发现它们提供相似或更差的结果，因此我们不报告它们。

items.en: When considering the same bandwidth, EnCodec is superior to all evaluated baselines considering the MUSHRA score. Notice, EnCodec at 3kbps reaches better performance on average than Lyra-v2 using 6kbps and Opus at 12kbps. When considering the additional language model over the codes, we can reduce the bandwidth by ∼25−40%similar-toabsent25percent40\sim 25-40\%. For instance, we can reduce the bandwidth of the 3 kpbs model to 1.9 kbps. We observe that for higher bandwidth, the compression ratio is lower, which could be explained by the small size of the Transformer model used, making hard to model all codebooks together.
items.zh: 当考虑相同带宽时，EnCodec在MUSHRA评分上优于所有评估的基线。注意，3 kbps的EnCodec平均性能优于使用6 kbps的Lyra-v2和12 kbps的Opus。当在码字上使用额外的语言模型时，我们可以将带宽降低约25-40%。例如，我们可以将3 kbps模型的带宽降低到1.9 kbps。我们观察到，对于更高的带宽，压缩比更低，这可能是由于使用的Transformer模型较小，难以对所有码本进行建模。

items.en: Next, we perform an ablation study to better evaluate the effect of the discriminator setup, streaming, multi-target bandwidth, and balancer. We provide more detailed ablation studies in the Appendix, Section A.3.
items.zh: 接下来，我们进行消融研究，以更好地评估判别器设置、流式传输、多目标带宽和平衡器的影响。我们在附录A.3节中提供了更详细的消融研究。

items.en: The effect of discriminators setup. Various discriminators were proposed in prior work to improve the perceptual quality of the generated audio. The Multi-Scale Discriminator (MSD) model proposed by Kumar et al. (2019) and adopted in (Kong et al., 2020; Andreev et al., 2022; Zeghidour et al., 2021), operates on the raw waveform at different resolutions. We adopt the same MSD configuration as described in Zeghidour et al. (2021). Kong et al. (2020) additionally propose the Multi-Period Discriminator (MPD) model, which reshapes the waveform to a 2D input with multiple periods. Next, the STFT Discriminator (Mono-STFTD) model was introduced in Zeghidour et al. (2021), where a single network operates over the complex-valued STFT.
items.zh: 判别器设置的影响。先前的工作中提出了各种判别器来改善生成音频的感知质量。Kumar等人（2019）提出并被（Kong等人，2020；Andreev等人，2022；Zeghidour等人，2021）采用的多尺度判别器（MSD）模型，在不同分辨率下对原始波形进行操作。我们采用与Zeghidour等人（2021）相同的MSD配置。Kong等人（2020）还提出了多周期判别器（MPD）模型，该模型将波形重塑为具有多个周期的二维输入。接着，Zeghidour等人（2021）引入了STFT判别器（Mono-STFTD）模型，其中单个网络对复值STFT进行操作。

items.en: We evaluate our MS-STFTD discriminator against three other discriminator configurations: (i) MSD+Mono-STFTD (as in Zeghidour et al. (2021)); (ii) MPD only; (iii) MS-STFTD only; (vi) MS-STFTD+MPD. Results are reported in Table 2. Results suggest that using only a multi-scale STFT-based discriminator such as MS-STFTD, is enough to generate high quality audio. Additionally, it simplifies the model training and reduces training time. Including the MPD discriminator, adds a small gain when considering the MUSHRA score.
items.zh: 我们将MS-STFTD判别器与其他三种判别器配置进行了评估：（i）MSD+Mono-STFTD（如Zeghidour等人（2021））；（ii）仅MPD；（iii）仅MS-STFTD；（iv）MS-STFTD+MPD。结果报告在表2中。结果表明，仅使用基于多尺度STFT的判别器（如MS-STFTD）就足以生成高质量音频。此外，它简化了模型训练并减少了训练时间。加入MPD判别器在考虑MUSHRA分数时略有增益。

items.en: The effect of the streamable modeling. We also investigate streamable vs. non-streamable setups and report results in Table 3. Unsurprisingly, we notice a small degradation switching from non-streamable to streamable but the performance remains strong while this setting enables streaming inference.
items.zh: 流式建模的影响。我们还研究了流式与非流式设置，并在表3中报告了结果。不出所料，从非流式切换到流式时，我们注意到性能略有下降，但性能仍然强劲，同时这种设置支持流式推理。

items.en: The effect of the balancer. Lastly, we present results evaluating the impact of the balancer. We train the EnCodec model considering various values λtsubscript𝜆𝑡\lambda_{t}, λfsubscript𝜆𝑓\lambda_{f}, λgsubscript𝜆𝑔\lambda_{g}, and λf​e​a​tsubscript𝜆𝑓𝑒𝑎𝑡\lambda_{feat} with and without the balancer. Results are reported in Table A.4 in the Appendix. As expected, results suggest the balancer significantly stabilizes the training process. See Appendix A.3 for more details.
items.zh: 平衡器的影响。最后，我们展示了评估平衡器影响的结果。我们使用不同的λt、λf、λg和λfeat值训练EnCodec模型，分别在有和没有平衡器的情况下。结果报告在附录表A.4中。正如预期，结果表明平衡器显著稳定了训练过程。更多细节见附录A.3。

items.en: All previously reported results considered only the monophonic setup. Although it makes sense when considering speech data, however for music data, stereo compression is highly important. We adjust our current setup to stereo by only modifying our discriminator setup as described in Section 3.4.
items.zh: 之前报告的所有结果仅考虑单声道设置。虽然这对语音数据有意义，但对于音乐数据，立体声压缩非常重要。我们通过仅修改第3.4节中描述的判别器设置，将当前设置调整为立体声。

items.en: Results for EnCodec working at 6 kbps, EnCodec with Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) at 6 kbps, and Opus at 6 kbps, and MP3 at 64 kbps are reported in Table 4. EnCodec is significantly outperforms Opus at 6kbps and is comparable to MP3 at 64kbps, while EnCodec at 12kpbs achieve comparable performance to EnCodec at 24kbps. Using a language model and entropy coding gives a variable gain between 20% to 30%.
items.zh: 表4报告了EnCodec在6 kbps、带残差向量量化（RVQ）的EnCodec在6 kbps、Opus在6 kbps以及MP3在64 kbps下的结果。EnCodec在6 kbps下显著优于Opus，并与64 kbps的MP3相当，而EnCodec在12 kbps下的性能与24 kbps的EnCodec相当。使用语言模型和熵编码可获得20%到30%的可变增益。

items.en: We report the initial latency and real time factor on Table 5. The real-time factor is here defined as the ratio between the duration of the audio and the processing time, so that it is greater than one when the method is faster than real time. We profiled all models on a single thread of a MacBook Pro 2019 CPU at 6 kbps.
items.zh: 我们在表5中报告了初始延迟和实时因子。这里实时因子定义为音频持续时间与处理时间的比值，因此当方法快于实时时，该值大于1。我们在MacBook Pro 2019 CPU的单线程上以6 kbps对所有模型进行了性能分析。

items.en: Initial latency. The 24 kHz streaming EnCodec model has an initial latency (i.e., without the computation time) of 13.3 ms. The 48 kHz non-streaming version has an initial latency of 1 second, due to the normalizations used. Note that using entropy coding increases the initial latency, because the stream cannot be “flushed” with each frame, in order to keep the overhead small. Thus decoding the frame at time t𝑡t, requires for the frame t+1𝑡1t+1 to be partially received, increasing the latency by 13ms.
items.zh: 初始延迟。24 kHz流式EnCodec模型的初始延迟（即不包括计算时间）为13.3毫秒。48 kHz非流式版本的初始延迟为1秒，这是由于所使用的归一化。注意，使用熵编码会增加初始延迟，因为流不能每帧“刷新”，以保持开销较小。因此，解码t时刻的帧需要部分接收t+1时刻的帧，从而将延迟增加13毫秒。

items.en: Real time factor. While our model is worse than Lyra v2 in term of processing speed, it processes the audio 10 times faster than real time, making it a good candidate for real life applications. The gain from the entropy coding comes at a cost, although the processing is still faster than real time and could be used for applications where latency is not essential (e.g. streaming). At 48 kHz, the increased number of step size lead to a slower than real time processing, although a more efficient implementation, or using accelerated hardware would improve the RTF. It could also be used for archiving where real time processing is not required.
items.zh: 实时因子。虽然我们的模型在处理速度上不如Lyra v2，但它处理音频的速度比实时快10倍，使其成为实际应用的良好候选。熵编码带来的增益是有代价的，尽管处理仍然快于实时，并且可以用于延迟不重要的应用（例如流媒体）。在48 kHz下，步长数量的增加导致处理速度慢于实时，尽管更高效的实现或使用加速硬件将改善RTF。它也可以用于不需要实时处理的存档。

items.en: We presented EnCodec : a state-of-the-art real-time neural audio compression model, producing high-fidelity audio samples across a range of sample rates and bandwidth. We showed subjective and objective results from 24kHz monophonic at 1.5 kbps (Figure 3) to 48kHz stereophonic (Table 4). We improved sample quality by developing a simple but potent spectrogram-only adversarial loss which efficiently reduces artifacts and produce high-quality samples. Besides, we stabilized training and improved the interpretability of the weights for losses through a novel gradient balancer. Finally, we also demonstrated that a small Transformer model can be used to further reduce the bandwidth by up to 40% without further degradation of quality, in particular for applications where low latency is not essential (e.g. music streaming).
items.zh: 我们提出了EnCodec：一种最先进的实时神经音频压缩模型，能够在各种采样率和带宽下生成高保真音频样本。我们展示了从24 kHz单声道1.5 kbps（图3）到48 kHz立体声（表4）的主观和客观结果。我们通过开发一种简单但有效的仅频谱图对抗损失来改进样本质量，该损失有效减少了伪影并生成了高质量样本。此外，我们通过一种新颖的梯度平衡器稳定了训练并提高了损失权重的可解释性。最后，我们还证明了一个小型Transformer模型可以用于进一步将带宽降低多达40%而不会进一步降低质量，特别是对于低延迟不是必需的应用（例如音乐流媒体）。
